blockers_encountered.description: mem0ai not installed; Mem0 arm skipped.
blockers_encountered.resolution: UNRESOLVED — install mem0ai + configure a local backend

blockers_encountered.description: R2_ANSWERER_BASE_URL/MODEL not set; retrieval-only run. answerer_accuracy null.

known_limitation: FathomDB recall < naive_rag on memory classes because entity-node hits from graph/dense arms fall through to str(sh.id) doc_ids (no match) and push real doc nodes lower in RRF ranking. Root cause: ingest_with_extractor creates entity nodes but not source-doc nodes; two-pass ingest gives FTS hits with correct doc_ids, but graph/dense arms prefer entity nodes. Does not affect pipeline validation — all arms, ELPS harness, and gold loader work correctly.
fixes_applied: use_default_embedder=True in ELPS path (drain edge_fact projection queue without SchedulerError)
Two-pass ingest: write() for doc cursor→doc_id mapping, ingest_with_extractor for entity/edge graph
drain(300s) between pass-1 and pass-2 (prevent CPU contention with BGE embedder → EngineError::Extractor)
max_tokens 2048→4096 in harness (reduce JSON truncation; 1 failure in v4 run vs 19 in v1)
note: Option 2 integration test — numbers are not benchmark-significant (N=100 corpus sample, LLM-generated gold). Validates ELPS→graph→R2 pipeline end-to-end: (1) ELPS harness spoke fathomdb.extract.v1 protocol correctly; (2) gold_gen.py produced 141 memory-class queries (32 temporal, 48 multi_hop, 27 knowledge_update, 34 multi_session); (3) ingest_with_extractor ran without error; (4) use_graph_arm=True with full three-arm RRF ran without crash; (5) all four go/no-go classes are non-null for both systems. Slice 30 go/no-go requires Option 3 (LongMemEval) for publicly-comparable numbers.
